title: Mexico becomes first country to reach knockout stage of World Cup, beating South Korea 1-0 - AP News
content: Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the World Cup. It marks a major triumph for a team that failed to get out of the group stage in 2022 and now has won twice on …

title: Thousands of baby seals died on two remote sub-Antarctic islands. Scientists now think they know why - CNN
content: A deadly strain of bird flu sweeping through remote islands near Antarctica has devastated the native wildlife population, killing an estimated 13,000 seal pups, as well as penguins and seabirds, researchers say.

title: World Cup: USMNT rides wave of belief into Australia clash — but a big question remains - Yahoo Sports
content: Even with all the momentum heading into the Australia match, everything still seems to come back to the same issue hanging over the group: Christian...

title: Vance postpones Iran talks trip to Switzerland - Axios
content: The White House said "the logistics of these negotiations have never been simple or predictable."

title: Blue paint on bottom of Reflecting Pool appears to be peeling away - WTOP
content: There’s a new twist in the ongoing saga to clean up the Reflecting Pool. Some of the new “American Flag Blue” paint used to coat the bottom appears to be peeling away.

title: Remnants from Tropical Storm Arthur drench Gulf states, flooding homes and forcing evacuations - CBS News
content: The remnants of Tropical Storm Arthur were battering parts of the southeastern U.S. with heavy rain, sparking flash flooding.

title: Canada's Ismael Kone suffers horrifying injury in World Cup vs. Qatar - USA Today
content: Canada's game against Qatar took a scary turn with a serious injury in the second half.

title: Ebola outbreak zone cases up almost 40 percent in a week - The Hill
content: The Ebola outbreak in Congo that’s spread across parts of Africa has killed more than 200 people in its first month and is considered the worst known outbreak at this stage, the Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) said Thursday. Ebo…

title: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet says AI transformation will 'take some time' as stock price takes another hit - Business Insider
content: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet says the company's AI strategy will pay off in the longterm.

title: White House talks with Anthropic shift to setting AI security rules - Politico
content: While a resolution to export controls may still be a ways off, the shift toward a technical standards-setting exercise is a clear sign that negotiations are moving forward.

title: Warsh wants markets to guide the Fed, not the other way around - Yahoo Finance
content: New Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh said financial markets are "probably the most important source of information to guide central bankers." Here's how that could i...

title: Macron’s diplomatic efforts bring Trump closer to European views - AP News
content: French President Emmanuel Macron's effort to court U.S. President Donald Trump culminated in a surprise moment at the Versailles Palace. Macron and other guests at the dinner there witnessed Trump sign the initial deal to end the war in Iran. Macron praised t…

title: Ukraine hits a Moscow oil refinery and other sites in a large-scale drone attack - NPR
content: Ukraine launched a wave of drone attacks on Russia early Thursday — one of the largest attacks on Russia's capital since the Kremlin ordered the invasion of Ukraine more than four years ago.

title: Meet the Elite Ukrainian Drone Units, ‘Ace’ Pilots Targeting Russian Fuel Trucks, Logistics - Kyiv Post
content: Ukraine has concentrated its best drone units against the Kremlin’s supply lines to Crimea. Probably, no army has ever faced so many skilled drone pilots as Russia in southern Ukraine right now.

title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants - The Verge
content: Adobe’s plan to stick AI assistants into all of its Creative Cloud suite is now fully underway, with new chatbots now rolling out to its editing and design apps
